channel.title: Causal inference on Peder M. Isager
channel.description: Recent content in Causal inference on Peder M. Isager

item.title: Introducing Causion: A web app for playing with DAGs
item.description: Causion is a free web app for building causal diagrams (DAGs) and then watching them behave—by simulating data and switching from observation to intervention with do(). Try it now: https://causion.pedermisager.org/ (it runs in your browser)
